packageRules.description: Roll every available update into a single weekly PR to keep noise low.

customManagers.description: Bump *_version vars in role defaults annotated with a `# renovate:` comment.
matchStrings: # renovate: datasource=(?<datasource>\S+) depName=(?<depName>\S+)(?: packageName=(?<packageName>\S+))?(?: registryUrl=(?<registryUrl>\S+))?(?: versioning=(?<versioning>\S+))?(?: extractVersion=(?<extractVersion>\S+))?\s*\n\s*\w+_version:\s*"(?<currentValue>[^"]+)"
